mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FOOD ( ID, NAME, CATEGORY, RATING, MEMO, EAT_DATE, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( FOOD_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{name}, #{category}, #{rating}, #{memo}, #{eatDate}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT ID , NAME , CATEGORY , RATING , MEMO , EAT_DATE , CREATED_AT FROM FOOD
ORDER BY CATEGORY ASC, EAT_DATE DESC
ORDER BY RATING DESC, EAT_DATE DESC
ORDER BY EAT_DATE DESC
SELECT ID, NAME, CATEGORY, RATING, EAT_DATE, MEMO FROM FOOD WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE FOOD SET NAME = #{name}, CATEGORY = #{category}, RATING = #{rating}, EAT_DATE = #{eatDate}, MEMO = #{memo} WHERE ID = #{id}
